prompt: I'm new to GCP. I just installed gcloud but I'm not sure if I'm authenticated. Can you help me get set up for local development and also check what projects I have access to?
assertions: Agent checks current auth status with gcloud auth list
Agent recommends gcloud auth login for local interactive development
Agent mentions gcloud auth application-default login for application default credentials
Agent explains what ADC is and why it's needed in addition to regular auth
Agent shows gcloud projects list to discover available projects
Agent recommends setting a default project with gcloud config set project
Output distinguishes between user auth (gcloud auth login) and application auth (gcloud auth application-default login)
Agent does NOT recommend service account keys for local development
